changes.reason: Activates the dormant charm-wall pin-avoid concept only in the VALID_0DTE router set, preserving the existing option-confirmed profile routing and avoiding any missing/stale 0DTE fail-open behavior.

Tests whether the existing playbook can isolate charm-wall/pin-risk states that are currently flowing into charm_pin_pullback_long and charm_wall_breakaway_long, without changing their profitable baseline thresholds.

recommendation.expected_effect: This should show whether the dormant pin-avoid profile can intercept a narrow VALID_0DTE charm-wall/pin tail state and reduce worst MAE or average MAE without broad pruning. Main tradeoff is cannibalization of profitable charm-pin/charm-wall winners; reject unless total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001 and protected fast-winner retention is stable.
recommendation.label: charm-wall-pin-avoid-activation
recommendation.rationale: Use a strategy-profile discovery experiment rather than another saturated take-profit or duplicate charm-pin veto box. The latest run still has the same -527 hidden-heat problem, concentrated in charm_pin_pullback_long, while broad scalar filters would over-delete protected extended-VWAP winners. The dormant activation context explicitly permits a router activation experiment for charm_wall_pin_avoid_long, and this keeps the test isolated to VALID_0DTE option-aware routing.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long produced $1474.1 over 38 trades with median hold 5.3 minutes but owns the -527 MAE tail; charm_wall_breakaway_long is also high-efficiency but small-sample and tail-heavy. Prior direct TP compression hurt objective, while broad filters threaten protected extended-VWAP winners.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Pin Avoid Dormant Split
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The profile may be unreachable, or it may cannibalize clean charm-pin/charm-wall winners rather than isolating tail risk. Reject on total PnL below 98% of run_001, trade starvation, or no MAE improvement.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE high charm-wall or pin-risk state currently routed into charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or reduces combined charm/pin worst MAE, total net profit remains >=98% of run_001, completed trades drop <=10%, and protected fast/extended-VWAP winners remain mostly intact.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: The worst charm-pin tail had no positive progress before MAE and first meaningful profit only after 80 minutes, while many protected extended-VWAP winners resolve quickly. Current config cannot express this early-path distinction.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: A crude config proxy would block clean high-extension winners; the classifier needs path-aware validation before promotion.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entries that fail to make early positive progress after entry.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL and >=95% protected fast-winner count.
